title: Audit inference-control sync-cost pattern as canonical substrate-doctrine reference (READ-FIRST)
description:
PRIORITY-1 prerequisite for the ability-cost cohort + every future cost-sync expansion per [[substrate-sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26]]. Substrate's first practiced cost-sync shipped 2026-05-22 (commit `2be1bb9bc4 wd 2026-05-22: sync-cost observability`) on the wrkstrm-app inference-control surface, backed by `inference-account-schemas v0.2.0`. Operator named this as the canonical pattern substrate expands across every cost-bearing operation — NOT a one-off. Audit scope: (1) read `inference-account-schemas/v0.2.0/spm/.../sources/` Swift sources thoroughly — every typed cost-event shape, invoice shape, ledger shape; (2) read the inference-control implementation at `private/universal/substrate/collectives/wrkstrm-app/private/apple/apps/inference-control/` — how the app actually wires invocation-to-invoice-to-ledger; (3) read `agents/chatgpt/memory/.docc/expertise/inference-control-gemini-shader-pacing.md` — operator-captured lessons learned (the gotchas substrate already paid for); (4) read `harnesses/hulk/memory/.docc/project_inference-control.md` + `project_inference-control-nerv-session.md` — project-level memories on what was tried + what shipped. Output: typed audit report in `agents/claude/memory/.docc/investigation.docc/sync-cost-pattern-2026-05-26.md` capturing the 4-layer pattern as extracted from inference-control, plus identifying which existing primitives ability-cost (and other expansions) should COMPOSE WITH, not parallel. Blocks all 5 ability-cost authoring beads.

## Composes with existing types (per [[cost-model-non-divergence-discipline]])

- (COMPLETED 2026-05-26; investigation report at agents/claude/memory/.docc/investigation.docc/sync-cost-pattern-as-practiced-2026-05-26.md)
